name: Triboo S.p.A.
summary: Triboo S.p.A. provides e-commerce and digital advertising services worldwide. It offers digital consulting, marketing, and integration and development services; and e-commerce management, content development, audience and monetization, and training services. The company is based in Milan, Italy. Triboo S.p.A. is a subsidiary of Compagnia Digitale Italiana Spa.
